allow: Bash(python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('/home/emersonagi/workspace/automacao/data/entrada/Medição Geral Março.xlsx', read_only=True, data_only=True\); print\('Sheets:', wb.sheetnames\); sh = wb['Frequencia']; rows = list\(sh.iter_rows\(values_only=True, max_row=3\)\); print\('Row 1:', rows[0]\); print\('Row 2:', rows[1]\); print\('Row 3:', rows[2]\); wb.close\(\)")
